top_candidates.reasoning: The engineering layer centres on the four-medium denial: 'Cleave with rewrites, burn with fashion cycles, soak with tech debt, dry with neglect.' The four denials map directly to śastra (cutting), pāvaka (burning), āpaḥ (wetting), māruta (drying). The Kubernetes→Nomad scenario tests each medium against a different artifact — this is unmistakably 2.23.

Possible because 2.24 also names the four denials (acchedyaḥ, adāhyaḥ, akledyaḥ, aśoṣyaḥ) — but as the affirmative list, alongside five additional properties. The engineering analog here is keyed to the four-medium denials specifically, not the nine-property affirmative list.

Possible because 2.21 is in the same imperishable-properties block — but 2.21 turns on the rhetorical 'how can he kill or be killed' and a four-property quartet of avināśin/nitya/aja/avyaya, not on the four-medium denials.
